[ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
I can read your mind and I know your story[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]B/D#[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]

Love comes to those who believe it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
And that's the way it is[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
